text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You know... After watching her today, I get the
feeling Air Shakur's gonna make it big next year.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Her vibe is a little different than the others, but I
dunno... She doesn't really give off "main
character" energy.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: It'd be nice if she had some kinda rival...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey!
choice_data_list: I'm getting the laptop ready right now!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: All right. Let's see what we have here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur doesn't even spare the time to dry her
sweat before inputting today's results into Parcae.
I stare at the screen, a heavy lump in my throat...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Is this for real?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: 6.9 centimeters.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The seven-centimeter gap is shrinking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur falls silent. I wouldn't have been
surprised if she celebrated a little more, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The number she thought would never change...
has. It seems she's more bewildered than
anything.
choice_data_list: Maybe this means your fate has changed.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No. This just means there's the possibility for it to change.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But there wasn't even a possibility before... There
was just a wall that I had no way of destroying.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yet now, even if it's just a single millimeter, it's
moved. I just might...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No... I gotta cut it out. There's no point puttin' faith in
what-ifs until I have irrefutable proof that it'll work.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I can't let my thoughts become clouded with bias. I've
gotta remain objective.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My physical stats haven't even reached the
thresholds required to win the Satsuki Sho yet.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's not a lot of time left, but I'm makin'
consistent progress. As long as I continue
following my workout regimen...
choice_data_list: I should win the Satsuki Sho. And then...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Then it's on.
